product_type: Speedlane Option for System IA-10 Two-Post Lift
capacity: 5,000 lbs per pad (except at corners as indicated); 1,500 max capacity zones at corners

dimensions.rubber_lifting_pads_size: 8 x 4-1/2 inches wide x 6 inches high

installation_requirements.compatible_models: System IA-10 (also compatible with System IA models, LC-12, TP-15, and TP-16 only)

specifications.title: Speedlane Option
specifications.welding_specs: AWS specifications to E-70xx electrodes or E-70T1 Code 5.3 flux core wire only

features: Speedlane option for rapid vehicle positioning on System IA-10 lift
1,500 lb max capacity at corner zones
Rubber lifting pads 8 x 4-1/2 inches wide x 6 inches high
Rubber lifting blocks 1 inch high x 6 x 4 inches

parts_list.description: 8 x 4-1/2 inches wide x 6 inches high

safety_features: Reduced 1,500 lb max capacity zones at corners clearly indicated
notes: Remove all sharp corners and edges
Unless otherwise specified, surface finish to be 125 RMS
Welding medium shall conform to AWS specifications
Information contained herein is confidential and property of Mohawk Resources Ltd.
Compatible with System IA models, LMF-12, TP-15 & TP-16 only
